goal: Optimize the Iron Mountain Ranch site for leads and implement best practices for lead engagement. Use Parallel Search MCP for research before implementation.
summary: IMR lead optimization: unify Calendly+UTM, fix NAP bugs, IMR-specific RealScout, add Search/Schedule/Call CTAs.
executionNote: bun and CURSOR_API_KEY are unavailable in this cloud-agent VM, so scripts/cli.ts cannot fan out real cloud-agent workers. Per the operator goal (production-ready changes on main), the root planner executed the worker scopes directly on branch cursor/iron-mountain-ranch-lead-optimization-0148. Task entries below document the decomposition and acceptance criteria that were satisfied. See attention.log.

portfolioConstraints.agent: Dr. Jan Duffy (NEVER Janet), License S.0197614.LLC, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties
portfolioConstraints.leadStack: RealScout PRIMARY for property-search leads; Calendly SECONDARY for appointments; NO generic HTML contact forms for lead capture; Follow Up Boss is CRM sink via native RealScout + Calendly integrations.
portfolioConstraints.nap: Office NAP from lib/site-config.ts must match paired GBP exactly (6628 Sky Pointe Dr., Las Vegas NV 89131 / (702) 500-1942 / DrDuffy@IronMountainRanchLasVegas.com).
portfolioConstraints.deploy: Vercel production on main after substantive changes.

research.tool: Parallel Search MCP unavailable in this VM; used built-in web_search as equivalent.
findings: Calendly attribution: append utm_source/utm_medium/utm_campaign/utm_content/utm_term to the scheduling URL, or pass a utm object to initPopupWidget/initInlineWidget. Each value <=255 chars. (Calendly Help)

RealScout: verified web components are realscout-office-listings and realscout-simple-search (registered by realscout-web-components.umd.js); home-value and advanced-search are dashboard-generated embeds, not standalone source tags. Do not fabricate a realscout-home-value element.
Hyperlocal SEO: community-specific content + FAQ schema + GBP-aligned NAP drives high-intent buyer/seller leads.
Conversion stack: visible Search + Schedule + Call CTAs with UTM attribution improves lead capture.

tasks.name: conversion-stack-calendly
tasks.scopedGoal: Create lib/calendly.ts as the single source of truth for Dr. Jan Duffy's Calendly scheduling URLs plus a buildCalendlyUrl() UTM helper, and refactor CalendlyButton/CalendlyWidget/CalendlyBadge to consume it and pass UTM through Calendly init calls. Normalize shorthand url props so an invalid value cannot silently break the widget.
acceptance: lib/calendly.ts exports canonical event URLs and buildCalendlyUrl with utm support
Calendly components accept optional UTM attribution and never render an invalid data-url
No generic HTML lead-capture forms introduced
tasks.verify: grep buildCalendlyUrl in components/calendly; type-check passes

tasks.name: nap-brand-fixes
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix per-site NAP/brand violations: contact page 'View on Google Maps' hardcodes a wrong address (9406 W Lake Mead Blvd) and the quick-email uses homes@heyberkshire.com; replace with the IMR office NAP from site-config and agentInfo.email. Fix the broken home-valuation Calendly widget (url="showing") to use the canonical valuation scheduling URL with UTM.
acceptance: No heyberkshire or 9406 W Lake Mead references remain on IMR pages
Contact map link and email match lib/site-config NAP
Home-valuation Calendly widget loads a valid scheduling URL
tasks.verify: grep -ri 'heyberkshire\|9406 W Lake Mead' app/ returns nothing; type-check passes

tasks.name: realscout-imr-listings
tasks.scopedGoal: Make components/realscout/RealScoutListings configurable (title, subtitle, priceMin, priceMax, agentEncodedId, viewAllUrl) preserving current defaults, and pass Iron Mountain Ranch-specific values ($300k-$800k, IMR copy) on IMR community pages.
acceptance: RealScoutListings renders verified realscout-office-listings web component
IMR pages show IMR-specific price band and copy
RealScout remains the primary property-search lead path
tasks.verify: type-check passes; IMR pages reference IMR price band

tasks.name: lead-cta-community-pages
tasks.scopedGoal: Build a reusable LeadCTA section (Search via RealScout + Schedule via Calendly + Call) with per-page UTM attribution and add it to the Iron Mountain Ranch community pages (/sub-communities and /sub-communities/[slug]).
acceptance: LeadCTA exposes Search, Schedule, and Call actions with tel: link to (702) 500-1942
Calendly link carries UTM attribution identifying the community page
Added to sub-communities index and village detail pages
tasks.verify: type-check passes; LeadCTA imported on sub-communities pages

tasks.name: verify-build
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify type-check and lint pass and the lead-conversion changes do not regress NAP/schema.
